label: 第66話
source_locator: 単行本8巻 目次 p.91
summary_short: 五条と夏油は、星漿体を狙う呪詛師集団Qと盤星教「時の器の会」の存在を知る。既に襲撃を受けていた天内理子を救出し、護衛任務を開始する。
summary_full: 夜蛾は、天元が約五百年ごとに星漿体と同化し肉体情報を更新しなければ、人ではない高次の存在へ進化し、意思を失う危険があると説明する。理子を狙うのは天元の暴走を望む呪詛師集団Qと、天元を純粋な存在として崇拝する盤星教「時の器の会」だった。孔時雨から暗殺依頼を受けた伏黒甚爾も動き始める。五条と夏油が理子のもとへ到着すると既にQが襲撃しており、落下する理子を五条が救出し、夏油はコークンと対峙する。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: 五条悟 and 夏油傑 are assigned a mission to escort the 星漿体 Vessel . However, two groups are trying their best to stop them in an attempt to kill the girl. The 呪詛師 group Q , and the 盤星教: The 時の器の会 .
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 夜蛾 entrusts 悟 and 傑 with escorting the 星漿体 Vessel. 夜蛾正道 sensei gives 悟 and 傑 a mission to escort the 星漿体 Vessel to 天元様 , calling it an "erasure". The boys joke with each other, agreeing that 夜蛾 has let his promotion to the next principal of the school drive him crazy. 傑 puts the jokes aside and asks if this mission is meant to reset 天元様の 術式 . 悟 isn't sure what they're referring to when it's something he should know. 夜蛾 explains that 天元様 is immortal but their 術式 does not stop the aging process. Once a certain age is reached, evolution will occur and 天元様 will no longer be the same person. 天元様 strengthens all barriers used by both 呪術高専 schools as well as all of the assistant managers' techniques. Once every 500 years, 天元様 must merge with a compatible 星漿体 Vessel and rewrite their body's information. Once the body is refreshed, the immortal 術式 will stop trying to change bodies and evolution will not occur. The 呪詛師 Group Q attempts to assassinate 理子. 悟 compares this situation to digimon, which suffices in this case. The location of the 星漿体 Vessel has been leaked and their are two groups searching for the girl. One is the 呪詛師 group Q, who wants to take over the jujutsu world by having 天元様 lose all reason. The other is a 盤星教 that worships 天元様 as their god, the 時の器の会. 天元様 and the 星漿体 Vessel must merge in two days when the moon is full. 夜蛾 is entrusting 傑 and 悟 to maintaining the security of jujutsu society. 悟 and 傑 leave for their mission and discuss why the 盤星教 is after the 星漿体 Vessel. 傑 explains that they worship a pure 天元様 and the merger would sully that purity in their eyes. However, they are not a 呪詛師 group and 傑 believes they won't be major players. 傑 says they should focus on repelling Q and 悟 believes they should be fine no matter what since they're the strongest. 傑 rescues the girl. 傑 interrupts his friend to advise him to be less rude around superiors. While they discuss 悟's bad attitude, there is an explosion at the site where they're meant to find the girl. After an explosion, the 星漿体 Vessel is thrown from the building by Q Soldier: Kokun . The 盤星教 employs 伏黒甚爾. Before the girl hits the ground, 傑 uses a flying curse to rescue her. He asks the 呪詛師 not to make a mess since the students already got in trouble today. Kokun demands the jujutsu high student hand over the girl but he refuses. 悟 watches from below, glad that 傑 made it in time with his curse. He notices five daggers thrown at him and uses the 無限 to halt them. Q Soldier Bayer confronts him and admits that he knows the name of the famous 五条悟. 悟 taunts the soldier and says that he won't beat him senseless if he cries and apologizes now, annoying Bayer. 孔時雨 , a representative of the 時の器の会 meets with a member of the 禪院 clan to plan an assassination of the 星漿体 Vessel. The man claims he is not a 禪院 anymore, and goes by 伏黒甚爾 now. He accepts the contract to kill the girl.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 五条悟 夏油傑 家入硝子 夜蛾正道 天内理子 Kokun Bayer 孔時雨 伏黒甚爾
candidate_evidence.battles_events_raw_text: 五条悟 & 夏油傑 vs. Bayer & Kokun (開始)
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 五条悟の術式 無下限呪術 無限 無限 夏油傑の術式 呪霊操術

key_events_verified_phase4: 天元と星漿体の同化の必要性が説明される
Qと盤星教が理子を狙う
伏黒甚爾が暗殺依頼を受ける
五条と夏油が理子の救出へ入る
verification_notes_phase4: 集英社公式8・9巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第四段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
